semantic.role: Defines reusable validation types and structural constraints for all ArchSpine data components, ensuring consistent formatting and type safety across the system.
invariants: All version strings MUST conform to semantic versioning pattern (e.g., 1.0.0).
All timestamps MUST be valid ISO 8601 date-time strings.
All repo-relative paths MUST NOT start with '/', './', or '../', and MUST NOT contain backslashes or double slashes.
Scope paths MUST NOT start with '/', './', or '../' but an empty string is allowed.
Content hashes MUST be exactly 64 lowercase hexadecimal characters (SHA-256).
Locale codes MUST follow IETF BCP 47 format.
Language selection keys MUST be non-empty strings.
Source language, file kind, symbol kind, dependency relation, edge provenance, and pipeline stage MUST be one of the defined enum values.
Non-empty strings MUST have at least one character.
String arrays MUST only contain string items.
Localized content maps MUST have keys that are valid language selection keys.

English.role: This schema file defines reusable validation types and structural constraints for all ArchSpine data components, ensuring consistent formatting and type safety across the system. It acts as the foundational contract for how data is shaped and verified throughout the entire pipeline.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Enforces that all version strings follow semantic versioning (e.g., 1.0.0). Impacts compatibility checks and schema migration.
parameter_definitions.isoTimestamp: Validates ISO 8601 date-time strings. Affects event ordering, audit trails, and synchronization.
parameter_definitions.repoRelativePath: Sanitizes file paths relative to repository root. Prevents path traversal or malformed references.
parameter_definitions.scopePath: Normalizes scope identifiers; empty string allowed for root scope. Affects module resolution.
parameter_definitions.contentHash: Enforces SHA-256 hex digest length (64 chars). Critical for cache invalidation and integrity verification.
parameter_definitions.locale: Validates BCP 47 locale codes (e.g., en-US). Controls internationalization matching.
parameter_definitions.languageSelectionKey: Non-empty string used as key for multilingual content maps. Ensures every entry is addressable.
parameter_definitions.sourceLanguage: Restricts source code language to known types. Prevents unsupported language entries from entering analysis.
parameter_definitions.fileKind: Categorizes files as source, config, document, or other. Enforces processing rules per type.
parameter_definitions.symbolKind: Classifies symbols (class, function, variable, interface, type, enum, unknown). Drives dependency graph semantics.
parameter_definitions.dependencyRelation: Defines relation type between modules (import, reexport, type-import). Affects build order and tree shaking.
parameter_definitions.edgeProvenance: Marks how dependency edges were discovered (ast, inferred). Distinguishes certain vs heuristic relationships.
parameter_definitions.pipelineStage: Indicates which analysis stage produced data (ast, llm, lite-ast, lite-llm, fallback). Enables stage-specific processing and fallback logic.
parameter_definitions.nonEmptyString: Guarantees string values have at least one character. Prevents empty fields in critical data.
parameter_definitions.stringArray: Defines a simple array of strings. Ensures homogeneous array content.
parameter_definitions.localizedContentMap: Stores multilingual content as a map keyed by locale code. Enables localized configuration and UI strings.

English.stability_and_risks: This schema establishes strong invariants that prevent malformed data from propagating through the system. Risks include overly strict patterns that may reject valid edge cases (e.g., non-standard version formats or future locale patterns). Enum values may become outdated as languages or analysis methods evolve. Regular schema audits are recommended to accommodate new requirements without breaking existing data.

Simplified Chinese.role: 此模式文件定义了 ArchSpine 所有数据组件的可复用验证类型和结构约束，确保整个系统中格式一致和类型安全。它作为数据如何塑造和验证的基础契约，贯穿整个流水线。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 强制版本字符串遵循语义化版本格式（例如 1.0.0）。影响兼容性检查和模式迁移。
parameter_definitions.isoTimestamp: 验证 ISO 8601 日期时间字符串。影响事件排序、审计追踪和同步。
parameter_definitions.repoRelativePath: 清理相对于仓库根目录的文件路径。防止路径遍历或格式错误的引用。
parameter_definitions.scopePath: 规范化作用域标识符；允许空字符串表示根作用域。影响模块解析。
parameter_definitions.contentHash: 强制 SHA-256 十六进制摘要长度为 64 个字符。对缓存失效和完整性验证至关重要。
parameter_definitions.locale: 验证 BCP 47 区域代码（例如 zh-CN）。控制国际化匹配。
parameter_definitions.languageSelectionKey: 用作多语言内容映射键的非空字符串。确保每个条目都可寻址。
parameter_definitions.sourceLanguage: 限制源代码语言为已知类型。防止不受支持的语言条目进入分析。
parameter_definitions.fileKind: 将文件分类为源代码、配置、文档或其他。按类型强制执行处理规则。
parameter_definitions.symbolKind: 对符号进行分类（类、函数、变量、接口、类型、枚举、未知）。驱动依赖图语义。
parameter_definitions.dependencyRelation: 定义模块之间的关系类型（导入、重导出、类型导入）。影响构建顺序和摇树优化。
parameter_definitions.edgeProvenance: 标记依赖边是如何发现的（AST、推断）。区分确定性关系与推测性关系。
parameter_definitions.pipelineStage: 指示数据由哪个分析阶段生成（AST、LLM、轻量AST、轻量LLM、回退）。支持按阶段处理及回退逻辑。
parameter_definitions.nonEmptyString: 确保字符串值至少有一个字符。防止关键数据中出现空字段。
parameter_definitions.stringArray: 定义一个简单的字符串数组。确保数组内容同质。
parameter_definitions.localizedContentMap: 以区域代码为键存储多语言内容。支持本地化配置和 UI 字符串。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此模式建立了强不变量，防止格式错误的数据在系统中传播。风险包括过于严格的模式可能拒绝有效的边缘情况（例如非标准版本格式或未来的区域模式）。随着语言或分析方法的发展，枚举值可能过时。建议定期审查模式以适应新需求而不破坏现有数据。
